# Usage

This directory is the application-facing guide for flux. Each page covers one
topic so consumers can jump directly to the integration detail they need.

## Start Here

- [capability-model.md](capability-model.md) — what flux can express and what stays above it.
- [linking.md](linking.md) — dynamic linking, static linking, and Meson subproject usage.
- [frame-lifecycle.md](frame-lifecycle.md) — creating a frame, recording commands, and presenting.
- [basic-drawing.md](basic-drawing.md) — drawing lines, circles, rectangles, and transformed shapes.
- [text.md](text.md) — system fonts, HarfBuzz shaping, glyph runs, and rendering text.
- [svg.md](svg.md) — how SVG parsing/rasterization fits above flux and lands in images or paths.
- [application-architecture.md](application-architecture.md) — recommended app/toolkit layering around flux.
